scripts.gen-types: pnpm kanel && pnpm ts-to-zod 'src/shared/schemas/public/*.ts' && pnpm build-index
scripts.build-index: for f in src/shared/schemas/public/*.zod.ts; do name=$(basename "$f" .zod.ts); schemaName="${name,,}Schema"; echo "export type $name = z.infer<typeof $schemaName>;" >> "$f"; done
